titleStmt.title: General Marshall to Mr. Walter S. Robertson, at Peiping

head.hi: General Marshall to Mr. Walter S. Robertson, at Peiping

div.p: 866. Please contact Doctor Leighton StuartAmerican President of Yenching University, Peiping. of Yenching University and see if he would be willing to come to Nanking for a week or 10 days, to assist me quietly by influencing certain Chinese officials of his acquaintance to a more moderate or tolerant point of view during current negotiations.

I am requesting such services of several others: Frank Price,Dr. Price had been American adviser to President Chiang Kai-shek. Doctor Wu Yi-fang of Ginling College, General LiMaj. Gen. Chen-pien Li, M. D., Director of the Serum Institute of the Chinese Ministry of War. of Army Medical Corps. W. P. MillsDr. Mills was head of the American missionary group at Nanking. suggested Dr. Stuart’s name. I would provide transportation. Arrival here would have to be during next 5 days.
